[![](https://www.carbolite.com/images/9e5de47d10b16e910440b28f286bf27f/709x/max/alpha/cg-logo-aries-plus-white.webp)](https://www.carbolite.com/products/control-options/ariesplus-controller/) # easy. precision. control. # Introducing the AriesPlus touch screen temperature controllers – designed for precision. [![](https://www.carbolite.com/clear.gif)](https://www.carbolite.com/products/control-options/ariesplus-controller/) ![](https://www.carbolite.com/images/61f917048cd2ccff0f424c3c1984c82b/2000x/max/alpha/pic-slider-aries.webp) ## Industrial Furnaces Rapid and highly consistent heating [Learn more](https://www.carbolite.com/products/chamber-furnaces/industrial-furnaces/) [![](https://www.carbolite.com/images/d61abca1a22e882eff9221582e04def7/x17/max/alpha/slider-industrial-products.webp)](https://www.carbolite.com/products/chamber-furnaces/industrial-furnaces/) ## Our **New** Service Plans Get the most out of your equipment! ## ✔ Annual maintenance included ✔ Extended warranty ✔ Attractive discounts, and much more [Learn more](https://www.carbolite.com/contact-services/technical-service/) # Carbolite - Heat Treatment Carbolite is a leading manufacturer of high temperature furnaces and ovens from 30°C to 3000°C. We are the technology leader in tube furnaces as well as vacuum and special atmosphere technology. With more than 80 years of experience in thermal engineering, Carbolite develops innovative solutions trusted by research laboratories, pilot plants and manufacturing sites around the world. Carbolite products are defined by their superior energy efficiency as well as excellent reliability and use of high-quality components.​ ## [up to 700°C Ovens\ \ ![up to 700°C Ovens](https://www.carbolite.com/images/5a10a38a7df18842672bdb5ab074d129/1904x/max/alpha/up-to-700c-ovens.webp)](https://www.carbolite.com/products/ovens/) - - [Precious Metals](https://www.carbolite.com/products/precious-metal-furnaces/) | - [Pyrolysis](https://www.carbolite.com/products/pyrolysis-furnaces/)
- [Quenching (Quench Hardening)](https://www.carbolite.com/applications/heating-applications/quenching/)
- [Liquid Silicon Infiltration](https://www.carbolite.com/applications/heating-applications/siliconization/)
- [Sintering](https://www.carbolite.com/applications/heating-applications/sintering/)
- [Smelting](https://www.carbolite.com/products/precious-metal-furnaces/scf-smelting-furnaces/)
- [Thermocouple Calibration](https://www.carbolite.com/products/thermocouple-calibration/)
- [Thermogravimetric Analysis (TGA)](https://www.carbolite.com/applications/heating-applications/loi-lod-tga/)
- [Vacuum Brazing](https://www.carbolite.com/applications/heating-applications/vacuum-brazing-vacuum-soldering/)
- [Vacuum Soldering](https://www.carbolite.com/applications/heating-applications/vacuum-brazing-vacuum-soldering/) | [Show all applications](https://www.carbolite.com/applications/heating-applications/) [![](https://www.carbolite.com/editor-images/d07007b3-71f9-4a4d-881c-944be25382e1)](https://www.verder-scientific.com/campaigns/ebook-mining-industry-registration/) ## Mining Industry News - E-Book \| VERDER Discover the latest trends, expert insights, and key developments shaping the mining industry. Download our exclusive February 2026 edition now. [Free Download](https://www.verder-scientific.com/campaigns/ebook-mining-industry-registration/) ## Carbolite Helping to improve our everyday lives [![](https://www.carbolite.com/images/247e7f81f0c0191bcee215232ef35928/1800x/max/alpha/pic-video-imagevideo-taking-care.webp)](https://www.carbolite.com/video_details/1/file_id/e10b044f-4508-4809-8825-09360c88abe7/lang/en) ### Carbolite Corporate Company Video [![](https://www.carbolite.com/images/93abb27bfca100a425b8f99199398c6e/1800x/max/alpha/pic-internetvideos-image.webp)](https://www.carbolite.com/video_details/1/file_id/5ba4fa55-8108-471b-8b23-4cbfc3c9c754/lang/en) ## Custom Designs ![](https://www.carbolite.com/images/fc1a4dbb9bf2355405e5884475af97b8/2000x/max/alpha/lhtx-100-200-automatic-with-hydrogen-project-custom-design-new.webp) Even with one of the most varied and extensive ranges of furnaces and ovens available, there are still occasions when a standard design simply does not meet a user’s precise requirements. That is when the real advantage in dealing direct with the manufacturer becomes clear, especially a manufacturer, who has the breadth and experience that Carbolite possesses. [Custom designed solutions](https://www.carbolite.com/products/custom-furnaces-ovens/) ![](https://www.carbolite.com/images/7da8c2cd5764cede7221e40d596d2aa0/1000x/max/alpha/keypoints-products-1.webp) ### 100.000+ Installed products ![](https://www.carbolite.com/images/6e749bdb3b8479782e6e58f3b4c31840/1000x/max/alpha/keypoints-warrenty-1.webp) 85+ Years of experience ![](https://www.carbolite.com/images/4f90395804631aa3798be0016f42e35b/1000x/max/alpha/keypoints-employees-1.webp) 210+ Employees ![](https://www.carbolite.com/images/1623b22743af876145c9f0eec1075cec/1000x/max/alpha/keypoints-earthpng-1.webp) 90+ Worldwide partners ## Modified atmosphere & vacuum ![](https://www.carbolite.com/images/b869fdf9aa2791e9ce0aed9d6ac793b5/2000x/max/alpha/pic-modified-atmosphere-example.webp) Carbolite offers a wide range of options for modified atmosphere and vacuum operation. This includes equipment for almost all standard products as well as dedicated vacuum furnaces up to 3000°C. Whether it is a simple add-on to a standard product or a fully customised system, Carbolite will surely have the right solution for your application. [Modified atmosphere & vacuum equipment](https://www.carbolite.com/products/modified-atmosphere/) ## Carbolite News Heating technology and thermal engineering - [![2026 SALES & SERVICE MEETING SUCCESS WITH OUR MARKET UNITS AND DISTRIBUTORS](https://www.carbolite.com/images/250cc3fd288c7fc1c678e4f365f0f837/2000x/max/alpha/2026-sales-service-meeting-success-with-our-market-units-and-distributors.webp)](https://www.carbolite.com/news/news-details/news_detail/2026-sales-service-meeting-success-with-our-market-units-and)[2026 SALES & SERVICE MEETING SUCCESS WITH OUR MARKET UNITS AND DISTRIBUTORS](https://www.carbolite.com/news/news-details/news_detail/2026-sales-service-meeting-success-with-our-market-units-and) - [![](https://www.carbolite.com/typo3temp/_processed_/d/a/csm_pic_news__interview_ncc_04589d28f5.png)](https://www.carbolite.com/news/news-details/news_detail/next-generation-materials-the-rise-of-ceramic-matrix-composites-cmcs-in)[Next-Generation Materials: The Rise of Ceramic Matrix Composites (CMCs) in High-Performance Industries](https://www.carbolite.com/news/news-details/news_detail/next-generation-materials-the-rise-of-ceramic-matrix-composites-cmcs-in) - [![Metrohm becomes new Carbolite Gero distributor in Australasia](https://www.carbolite.com/images/1c490b2e4ab24e3ddc44c0c484b97aac/900x/max/alpha/metrohm-becomes-new-carbolite-gero-distributor-in-australasia.webp)](https://www.carbolite.com/news/news-details/news_detail/metrohm-becomes-new-carbolite-gero-distributor-in-australasia)[Metrohm becomes new Carbolite Gero distributor in Australasia](https://www.carbolite.com/news/news-details/news_detail/metrohm-becomes-new-carbolite-gero-distributor-in-australasia) [More news >](https://www.carbolite.com/news/) [Verder](https://www.verder-scientific.com/ "Verder") ## Verder Enabling Progress The SCIENTIFIC Division of the VERDER Group sets standards in high-tech equipment for quality control, research and development of solid matter. The fields of activity cover sample preparation of solids as well as analysis technologies. The well-known Verder Scientific companies have served research institutions, analytical laboratories as well as manufacturing companies in quality control and process applications for many decades with ever more sophisticated and reliable products which offer the solution to their individual task. [Carbolite](https://www.carbolite.com/ "Carbolite") Heat Treatment [ELTRA](https://www.eltra.com/ "ELTRA") Elemental Analysis [QATM](https://www.qatm.com/ "QATM") Materialography & Hardness Testing [Retsch](https://www.retsch.com/ "Retsch") Milling & Sieving [Microtrac](https://www.microtrac.com/ "Microtrac") Particle Characterization Pharmaceutical Testing -
